understanding.goal_understanding: Finish the current level (BP35) by navigating the character to the goal gem tile marked '+', then continue clearing subsequent levels until the game is won, while staying within the per-attempt turn limit.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Each turn you either MOVE_LEFT or MOVE_RIGHT (horizontal only) or CLICK a specific tile to interact (typically removing a breakable 'x'); after any horizontal move, gravity automatically carries the character in the current gravity direction until they land on a solid/support tile, hit a hazard, or reach the goal. Landing on spike tiles ('u'/'v') immediately ends the attempt. UNDO reverts the previous action. Movement planning relies on the provided landing previews (left_landing/right_landing and corridor_scan) to choose safe landings and prioritize passage columns that drop to new sections; clicks do not consume platform timers (when present) but moves do.
